title: Insulated Travel Tumbler with Flip Straw, 900ml, Double-Wall Stainless Steel, Handle, Pink, Grey, Beige (Beige)
features: CAPACITY: Large 900ml capacity double-wall insulated tumbler, perfect for keeping beverages at desired temperature throughout the day
DESIGN FEATURES: Convenient flip-top straw mechanism and ergonomic handle for easy carrying and drinking on-the-go
CONSTRUCTION: Premium stainless steel double-wall construction ensures excellent temperature retention for both hot and cold drinks
COLOUR OPTIONS: Available in three stylish colours - pink, grey, and beige to suit different preferences
PORTABILITY: Ideal travel companion with secure lid design and comfortable grip, suitable for commuting, office, or outdoor activities
description: Product Description Stay Hydrated in Style — Wherever Life Takes You Keep your drink hot or cold for hours with our 900 ml Insulated Travel Tumbler. Designed for modern living — functional, durable, and effortlessly chic. Hot or Cold for Hours — You Choose. Our double-wall vacuum-insulated stainless steel construction keeps drinks cold for up to 12 hours and hot for up to 6 hours . Perfect for your coffee, smoothies, protein shakes, or water — your drink stays just the way you like it, wherever you go. Key points: Premium 304 stainless steel interior – rust-resistant and odour-free. Sweat-proof exterior that stays dry to the touch. Leak-resistant flip-straw lid for effortless sipping on the move. Your Perfect Companion — From Office to Outdoors. Built for comfort and convenience: Ergonomic handle for easy carrying and secure grip. 900 ml (30 oz) capacity keeps you hydrated all day. Fits most car cup holders and gym equipment holders. Durable powder-coated finish resists scratches and fingerprints. No Spills. No Hassle. Just Sip and Go. Our BPA-free flip straw lid lets you enjoy your drink without removing the top — ideal for workouts, commutes, or desk days. The silicone-sealed lid prevents leaks, while the wide mouth makes it easy to add ice cubes or clean after use. A Colour for Every Personality. Available in three elegant colours — Blush Pink, Stone Grey, and Warm Beige — the tumbler complements any lifestyle or outfit. The minimalist design with matte finish brings understated elegance wherever you take it — from the gym to your morning meeting. Better for You, Better for the Planet. Reduce single-use plastics and enjoy your drink sustainably. Reusable and eco-friendly . Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Made from non-toxic, BPA-free materials . Make a small change with a big impact — choose reusable hydration that lasts. Hydration Made Simple. Style Made Effortless. Click “Add to Basket” now and experience the perfect balance of style, performance, and sustainability with our 900 ml Insulated Travel Tumbler — your drink’s best companion, wherever you go.
